text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Grass Wonder! Grass Wonder has won the
Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: That's the Beast's successor for you!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Even Maruzensky couldn't make this dream a
reality!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder says nothing as the acclaim
continues pouring in. She keeps her head bowed
respectfully low.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During lunch a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, may I have a moment before we begin
today's training session?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I have a gift for you. It's... nothing all too special.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Just a small token of my appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I didn't achieve the Triple Crown all on my own.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm merely the one who's subject to the public's
eye.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I feel that the message should come directly
from myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We won the Triple Crown. ♪ Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, she presents three small winner's
sashes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, I thank you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown is the highest honor one can
achieve in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A dream the vast majority of Umamusume will
never realize, no matter how badly they may want
it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I feel that I can truly stand tall.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for making me a Triple Crown
champion.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No... I still have much to learn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder seems to be implying something.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: If I may add something minor as well...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The defeated Umamusume aren't the only ones
who couldn't realize their Triple Crown dreams.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Many never get the chance to compete at all, due
to various circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The wall of "if only" that many Umamusume run
into is unfathomably high.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Which is why, now that I've received the highest
of honors...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I fully comprehend the enormity of the wall I must
clear.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That's why I'll fasten my helm on tight and
strive to be even better moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My determination holds strong. I hope that yours
won't falter either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glimpse a burning blue flame within her eyes
before it disappears behind her serene smile.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep... Completely ignored once again.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh? Whatcha doing over here, Sei?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nothing really.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
By the way, wanna hit up the shopping district?
Maybe get some taiyaki, sweets, or something?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooh, that sounds nice!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But also kind of sudden...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Meh... I need a distraction, and I figure food'll do
the trick.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the Classic Triple Crown ends on a
quiet note. The Japan Cup, however, is right
around the corner.
